case_title: AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. VS FLORES, JULIO

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JULIO
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,225.21 FILED BY AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-09-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 06

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AVCO FINANCIAL SERVICES INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, JULIO $2,225.21 PRINCIPAL, $61.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,286.21, IF CAR IS RETURNED TO PLTF & PLTF SELLS IT FOR $ 1500 OR MORE THE BALANCE OF JUDGMENT WILL BE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
